text.title: PWA Development Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply PWA Development end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and an optional decision gate.

step.name: author-manifest
step.action: Author manifest.webmanifest with name, short_name, start_url, display, icons (192/512/maskable).
step.decision-gate: Reject if any required field missing.

step.name: register-sw
step.action: Register SW at root scope; guard registration by HTTPS / localhost.
step.decision-gate: Reject scope nesting without documented reason.

step.name: author-cache-plan
step.action: For each route pick strategy + TTL + maxEntries; forbid cache-first on shell.
step.decision-gate: Reject any cache-first on shell route.

step.name: wire-update-flow
step.action: Enable skipWaiting + clients.claim; wire UI prompt on new SW activation.

step.name: ship-offline-page
step.decision-gate: Reject navigation routes without offline fallback.
